positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a mystical forest landscape at twilight. Central composition featuring massive, symmetrical trees with bioluminescent details, creating glowing, vibrant patterns. The color palette should be deep indigo, electric cyan, emerald green, and soft magenta. Use clean silhouette techniques combined with highly detailed linework, giving the aesthetic of stained glass or woodcut engraving. Focus on strong contrast and crisp lines suitable for apparel printing. Aspect ratio should emphasize a central, breathable composition.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, messy, noise, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy
